title: Les amants du pont Saint-Jean
actors: Michel Simon, Gaby Morlay, Nadine Alari
plot: On the banks of the Rhône, not far from Tain l'Hermitage, Alcide Garonne, an old ferryman - and incidentally a poacher - lives out of wedlock with Victorine Rousset nicknamed Maryse, a colorful tramp. When Garrone's son, Pilou, a ...
